item.title: HKS313 arrived at SVG from SVG
item.description:
CHC Helikopter Service #313 arrived at Stavanger, Sola (SVG) at 08:57AM CEST from Stavanger, Sola (SVG) after 1:20 en route
For more information visit https://www.flightaware.com/live/flight/HKS313/history/20260415/0543Z/ENZV/ENZV
To edit or disable these alerts please visit https://www.flightaware.com/account/manage/alerts/
FlightAware
item.dc:creator: Flight activity (alerts@flightaware.com)
